languages.text: {n}Герцогиня вздрагивает — шелковая нить четок с хлопком рвется, бусины рассыпаются по мостовой.{/n} "Большая дерзость — обвинять главу благородного дома в столь отвратительном проступке. Даже если есть доказательства, вы здесь никто, и ваше слово против моего — ничто. Я выслушаю ваши россказни, но только потому, что вы наверняка начнете докучать и другим важным персонам. Сплетни нам сейчас ни к чему".

traits.locale_text: {n}Герцогиня вздрагивает — шелковая нить четок с хлопком рвется, бусины рассыпаются по мостовой.{/n} "Большая дерзость — обвинять главу благородного дома в столь отвратительном проступке. Даже если есть доказательства, вы здесь никто, и ваше слово против моего — ничто. Я выслушаю ваши россказни, но только потому, что вы наверняка начнете докучать и другим важным персонам. Сплетни нам сейчас ни к чему".

languages.text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

Даже если есть доказательства, вы здесь никто, и ваше слово против моего — ничто. Я выслушаю ваши россказни, но только потому, что вы наверняка начнете докучать и другим важным персонам. Сплетни нам сейчас ни к чему".

Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

languages.text: {n}女爵浑身一颤，项链的丝线应声而断，珠子噼里啪啦散落一地。{/n}“指控一位贵族家主犯下如此骇人听闻的罪行，简直无礼至极。就算你有证据，在这儿也是人微言轻，你的话跟我比起来毫无分量。我可以听完你的胡编乱造，但也只是因为，你迟早会去纠缠其他大人物。眼下这种时候，可容不得流言蜚语。”
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

traits.locale_text: {n}女爵浑身一颤，项链的丝线应声而断，珠子噼里啪啦散落一地。{/n}“指控一位贵族家主犯下如此骇人听闻的罪行，简直无礼至极。就算你有证据，在这儿也是人微言轻，你的话跟我比起来毫无分量。我可以听完你的胡编乱造，但也只是因为，你迟早会去纠缠其他大人物。眼下这种时候，可容不得流言蜚语。”

languages.text: {n}La duchesse tressaille et se crispe, rompant le fil de son chapelet dont les grains s'éparpillent sur les pavés.{/n} « Il faut être d'une impertinence suprême pour accuser la dirigeante d'une noble maison d'un crime aussi odieux. Même s'il existait des preuves, vous n'avez aucune influence ici et votre parole ne vaut rien contre la mienne. Je veux bien écouter vos élucubrations, mais seulement pour vous empêcher d'aller importuner d'autres personnages importants. Il serait malvenu de colporter des ragots dans de telles circonstances. »
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

Même s'il existait des preuves, vous n'avez aucune influence ici et votre parole ne vaut rien contre la mienne. Je veux bien écouter vos élucubrations, mais seulement pour vous empêcher d'aller importuner d'autres personnages importants. Il serait malvenu de colporter des ragots dans de telles circonstances. »

languages.text: {n}İrkilen düşesin kolyenin ipek ipini koparması üzerine boncuklar kaldırıma saçılıyor.{/n} "Soylu bir hanenin başını böyle iğrenç bir suçla itham etmek, küstahlığı da aşıyor artık. Kanıt olsa bile burada bir hiçsiniz ve benim sözüm karşısında sizin sözünüzün hiçbir değeri yok. Sırf diğer önemli şahsiyetlere musallat olacağınızı bildiğimden bu uydurma söylemlerinizi dinleyeceğim. Böyle bir zamanda dedikoduya mahal veremeyiz."
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

Kanıt olsa bile burada bir hiçsiniz ve benim sözüm karşısında sizin sözünüzün hiçbir değeri yok. Sırf diğer önemli şahsiyetlere musallat olacağınızı bildiğimden bu uydurma söylemlerinizi dinleyeceğim. Böyle bir zamanda dedikoduya mahal veremeyiz."

languages.text: {n}La duquesa recula y la seda del collar se rompe, llenando el suelo de cuentas.{/n} «Es más que impertinente acusar a la líder de una casa noble de un crimen tan espantoso. Y, aunque hubiera pruebas, aquí no es usted nadie y su palabra no es nada contra la mía. Escucharé sus falsedades, pero solo porque si no empezará a molestar a otras figuras importantes y no es el momento de escuchar chismorreos infundados».
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

traits.locale_text: {n}La duquesa recula y la seda del collar se rompe, llenando el suelo de cuentas.{/n} «Es más que impertinente acusar a la líder de una casa noble de un crimen tan espantoso. Y, aunque hubiera pruebas, aquí no es usted nadie y su palabra no es nada contra la mía. Escucharé sus falsedades, pero solo porque si no empezará a molestar a otras figuras importantes y no es el momento de escuchar chismorreos infundados».

languages.text: {n}Als die Herzogin kurz zuckt, reißt der seidene Faden der Halskette und ihre Perlen prasseln zu Boden.{/n} "Es ist mehr als impertinent, das Oberhaupt eines Adelshauses eines so abscheulichen Verbrechens zu bezichtigen. Selbst wenn es einen Beweis gäbe, seid Ihr hier ein Niemand, und Euer Wort ist nichts gegen meines. Ich werde mir Eure Lügengeschichten anhören, allerdings nur, weil Ihr gewiss noch andere wichtige Personen damit behelligen werdet. Wir können uns in Zeiten wie diesen keinen Tratsch leisten."
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."

traits.locale_text: {n}Als die Herzogin kurz zuckt, reißt der seidene Faden der Halskette und ihre Perlen prasseln zu Boden.{/n} "Es ist mehr als impertinent, das Oberhaupt eines Adelshauses eines so abscheulichen Verbrechens zu bezichtigen. Selbst wenn es einen Beweis gäbe, seid Ihr hier ein Niemand, und Euer Wort ist nichts gegen meines. Ich werde mir Eure Lügengeschichten anhören, allerdings nur, weil Ihr gewiss noch andere wichtige Personen damit behelligen werdet. Wir können uns in Zeiten wie diesen keinen Tratsch leisten."

languages.text:
{n}公爵夫人の身震い。首飾りの絹糸が切れ、玉が路面に散りばめられた。{/n}
「貴家の当主がこのような卑劣な罪を犯したと非難するとは、無礼の極みだ。証拠があったとしても、貴方はここに誰もいない。貴方の言葉は私の言葉に勝るものはない。貴方の作り話を聞くのは、貴方が他の重要な人物にまでしつこく迫るのを防ぐためだ。このような時、噂話を広めるわけにはいかない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The duchess flinches, and the silk thread of the necklace snaps, sending beads scattering across the pavement.{/n} "It is beyond impertinent to accuse the head of a noble house of such a heinous offence. Even if there were proof, you are no one here, and your word is nothing against mine. I will listen to your fabrications, but only because you will surely start pestering other important personages. We cannot have gossip at a time like this."
